description: Install dependencies and verify the baseline project builds and tests pass before making changes.
steps: Run npm ci in /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-ts-kiro to install all dependencies
Run npx jest to confirm all existing tests pass (expect passing suite for CdkBaseStack)
Run npx cdk synth to confirm CloudFormation synthesis works
acceptance_criteria: All existing tests pass (npx jest exits 0)
npx cdk synth produces cdk.out/ with valid CloudFormation template
findings: NODE_OPTIONS env var contains --require for a missing preload module. Must use NODE_OPTIONS="" prefix for all npm/npx commands. npm ci produces deprecation warnings for glob/inflight but completes successfully. All 16 existing tests pass. CDK synth produces valid CdkBaseStack.template.json.
